// <Implementation-Instructions>
// 아래의 Instruction은 hardware description file(yaml)에 정의된 내용임.
// 이 Unit 반드시 아래의 Instruction을 따라 개발돼야 함.

// </Implementation-Instructions>

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Diagnostics;

using TopEquipmentBase.PhysicalLayer;
using TopEquipmentBase.Process;

using MoldInspectorMachine.Steps;
using MoldInspectorMachine.Hardwares.IO;
using MoldInspectorMachine.Core.Recipe;
using TOPENG_Device;

namespace MoldInspectorMachine.Hardwares
{
    /// <summary>
    /// CIM Unit
    /// </summary>
    /// <remarks>
    /// 
    /// </remarks>
    public class CIMUnitUnit : UnitBase
    {

        // Step instances for workflow execution
        private CheckSubsystemStateStep _checkSubsystemStateStep;
        // 2026-02-24 CursorAI - SDC CIM 구현 컨셉 기반 Alive Bit 5초 주기 태스크
        // 2026-02-25 CursorAI - 프로그램 실행 시 Local에서 5초 주기 Alive Bit 자동 시작. Master가 Local PC Live 상태 확인 가능.
        private static CIMAliveTask _cimAliveTask;
        private bool _executeScenario = false;        

        /// <summary>
        /// CIMUnitUnit의 새 instance 생성
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="id">Unit의 고유 식별자</param>
        /// <param name="name">Unit의 이름</param>
        public CIMUnitUnit(Enum unitEnum, string unitName) : base(unitEnum, unitName)
        {
            // Child device 추가
            // 2026-02-24 CursorAI - CIM Alive 태스크 인스턴스 (공용)
            if (_cimAliveTask == null)
                _cimAliveTask = new CIMAliveTask();
            // 2026-02-25 CursorAI - 프로그램 실행 시 5초 주기 Alive Bit 자동 시작. 계속 동작하여 Master에서 Local Live 상태 확인.
            _cimAliveTask.Start();
            // 2026-03-02 CursorAI에 의한 코드 생성: 프로그램 시작 시 설비 상태 보고 1회(Alive Bit와 함께). Data.CIMEquipStatus 구조체 값을 CIM 보고에 사용.
            short[] equipStatusBuffer = null;
            try
            {
                var data = Equipment.Instance?.Data as MoldInspectorMachineData;
                if (data?.CIMEquipStatus != null)
                    equipStatusBuffer = data.CIMEquipStatus.ToWordBuffer();
            }
            catch { /* Equipment.Instance 또는 Data 미준비 시 무시 */ }
            CIMScenarioDispatcher.ReportEquipStatusOnce(equipStatusBuffer);
            // 2026-02-28 CursorAI에 의한 코드 생성: 시나리오 완료 확인을 위한 ScenarioCompleted 이벤트 구독
            CIMScenarioDispatcher.ScenarioCompleted += OnScenarioCompleted;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// 2026-02-28 CursorAI에 의한 코드 생성: 시나리오 완료 시 로그로 완료 확인.
        /// </summary>
        private void OnScenarioCompleted(ScenarioCompletedArgs args)
        {
            if (args.Success)
            {
                _executeScenario = true;
                Logger.Debug("CIM Scenario completed: {Scenario}", args.Scenario);
            }
            else
            {
                _executeScenario = true;
                Equipment.Instance.Data.AlarmBit[(int)TOPENG_UI.ErrorCode.CIMFail] = true;
                Logger.Warning(args.Error, "CIM Scenario failed: {Scenario}, {Message}", args.Scenario, args.Message);
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Defines workflows for each hardware state.
        /// Unit-level workflows coordinate device operations within the unit.
        /// </summary>
        public override Dictionary<HardwareState, WorkflowDefinition<StepBase>> DefineStateWorkflows()
        {
            InitializeSteps();
            var workflows = new Dictionary<HardwareState, WorkflowDefinition<StepBase>>();

            // Idle state workflow
            var IdleWorkflowBuilder = new WorkflowBuilder<StepBase>();
            IdleWorkflowBuilder.StartWith(_checkSubsystemStateStep);
            workflows[HardwareState.Idle] = IdleWorkflowBuilder.Build();

            // Starting state workflow
            var StartingWorkflowBuilder = new WorkflowBuilder<StepBase>();
            StartingWorkflowBuilder.StartWith(_checkSubsystemStateStep);
            workflows[HardwareState.Starting] = StartingWorkflowBuilder.Build();

            // Execute state workflow
            var ExecuteWorkflowBuilder = new WorkflowBuilder<StepBase>();
            ExecuteWorkflowBuilder.StartWith(_checkSubsystemStateStep);
            workflows[HardwareState.Execute] = ExecuteWorkflowBuilder.Build();

            // Completing state workflow
            var CompletingWorkflowBuilder = new WorkflowBuilder<StepBase>();
            CompletingWorkflowBuilder.StartWith(_checkSubsystemStateStep);
            workflows[HardwareState.Completing] = CompletingWorkflowBuilder.Build();

            // Resetting state workflow
            var ResettingWorkflowBuilder = new WorkflowBuilder<StepBase>();
            ResettingWorkflowBuilder.StartWith(_checkSubsystemStateStep);
            workflows[HardwareState.Resetting] = ResettingWorkflowBuilder.Build();

            // Stopping state workflow
            var StoppingWorkflowBuilder = new WorkflowBuilder<StepBase>();
            StoppingWorkflowBuilder.StartWith(_checkSubsystemStateStep);
            workflows[HardwareState.Stopping] = StoppingWorkflowBuilder.Build();

            // Aborting state workflow
            var AbortingWorkflowBuilder = new WorkflowBuilder<StepBase>();
            AbortingWorkflowBuilder.StartWith(_checkSubsystemStateStep);
            workflows[HardwareState.Aborting] = AbortingWorkflowBuilder.Build();

            // Clearing state workflow
            var ClearingWorkflowBuilder = new WorkflowBuilder<StepBase>();
            ClearingWorkflowBuilder.StartWith(_checkSubsystemStateStep);
            workflows[HardwareState.Clearing] = ClearingWorkflowBuilder.Build();

            // Holding state workflow
            var HoldingWorkflowBuilder = new WorkflowBuilder<StepBase>();
            HoldingWorkflowBuilder.StartWith(_checkSubsystemStateStep);
            workflows[HardwareState.Holding] = HoldingWorkflowBuilder.Build();

            // Unholding state workflow
            var UnholdingWorkflowBuilder = new WorkflowBuilder<StepBase>();
            UnholdingWorkflowBuilder.StartWith(_checkSubsystemStateStep);
            workflows[HardwareState.Unholding] = UnholdingWorkflowBuilder.Build();

            // Suspending state workflow
            var SuspendingWorkflowBuilder = new WorkflowBuilder<StepBase>();
            SuspendingWorkflowBuilder.StartWith(_checkSubsystemStateStep);
            workflows[HardwareState.Suspending] = SuspendingWorkflowBuilder.Build();

            // Unsuspending state workflow
            var UnsuspendingWorkflowBuilder = new WorkflowBuilder<StepBase>();
            UnsuspendingWorkflowBuilder.StartWith(_checkSubsystemStateStep);
            workflows[HardwareState.Unsuspending] = UnsuspendingWorkflowBuilder.Build();

            return workflows;
        }

        private void InitializeSteps()
        { 
            // Initialize step instances
            _checkSubsystemStateStep = new CheckSubsystemStateStep(this);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// CIMUnitUnit에서 지원하는 command 실행
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="command">실행할 command</param>
        /// <returns>Command 실행 결과</returns>
        public override CommandResult Execute(ICommand command)
        {
            try
            {
                Logger.Debug(
                    "Executing command {CommandType} on unit {UnitId}",
                    command.CommandType, Id);

                // Parameters에서 CommandType 추출 (있는 경우)
                string commandType = command.Parameters.ContainsKey("CommandType")
                    ? command.Parameters["CommandType"]?.ToString()
                    : command.CommandType;

                CommandResult result;

                switch (commandType)
                {
                    case "":
                        result = Executenull(command);
                        break;

                    case "_ready":
                        result = ExecuteReady(command);
                        break;                    

                    case "_check_command":
                        result = ExecuteCheckCommand(command);
                        break;

                    case "_execute_command":
                        result = ExecuteExecuteCommand(command);
                        break;

                    case "_check_event":
                        result = ExecuteCheckEvent(command);
                        break;

                    case "_execute_event":
                        result = ExecuteExecuteEvent(command);
                        break;

                    case "_run":
                        result = ExecuteRun(command);
                        break;

                    default:
                        result = new CommandResult { Success = false, Message = $"Unsupported command type: {commandType}" };
                        break;
                }

                return result;
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                return new CommandResult
                {
                    Success = false,
                    Message = $"Command execution failed: {ex.Message}",
                    Error = ex
                };
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// 
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="command"> command</param>
        /// <returns>Command 실행 결과</returns>
        private CommandResult Executenull(ICommand command)
        {
            // TODO:  구현

            /*
            var commandResult = new CommandResult
                                    {
                                        Success = true,
                                        Message = "Read executed successfully (implementation needed)",
                                        Data = new Dictionary<string, object>
                                                {
                                                    { "sensorData", 12.1 },
                                                    { "spped", 30.0 }
                                                }
                                    };
            */

            return new CommandResult 
            { 
                Success = true, 
                Message = " executed successfully (implementation needed)" 
            };
        }

        // 2026-02-24 CursorAI - SDC CIM 구현 컨셉 기반 TOPENG_Device CIM 연동
        private CommandResult ExecuteReady(ICommand command)
        {
            string nextstep = "_read_plc_data";
            string restartstep = "";
            string errorstep = "";

            _cimAliveTask?.Start();
            return new CommandResult { Success = true, Message = "CIM ready, Alive task started." };
        }

        private CommandResult ExecuteReadPlcData(ICommand command)
        {
            string nextstep = "_check_command";
            string restartstep = "";
            string errorstep = "";

            MPLC.PLCRead(false, 0, (int)MPLC.enumDeviceType.B, false);
            MPLC.PLCRead(false, 0, (int)MPLC.enumDeviceType.W, false);            

            return new CommandResult { Success = true, Message = "PLC data read via MPLC buffers." };
        }

        private CommandResult ExecuteCheckCommand(ICommand command)
        {
            string nextstep = "_execute_command";
            string restartstep = "";
            string errorstep = "";            

            CIMScenario? scenario = GetScenarioFromParameters(command);
            if (scenario.HasValue)
            {
                nextstep = "_execute_command";
                bool cond = IsScenarioCondition(scenario.Value);
                return new CommandResult { Success = true, Data = new Dictionary<string, object> { { "Scenario", scenario.Value.ToString() }, { "ConditionMet", cond } } };
            }
            {
                nextstep = "_check_event";
            }
            return new CommandResult { Success = true, Message = "Check command (no scenario specified)." };
        }

        private CommandResult ExecuteExecuteCommand(ICommand command)
        {
            string nextstep = "_check_event";
            string restartstep = "";
            string errorstep = "";

            CIMScenario? scenario = GetScenarioFromParameters(command);
            if (scenario.HasValue)
            {
                _executeScenario = true;
                // 2026-02-28 CursorAI에 의한 코드 생성: 시나리오 비동기 실행(fire-and-forget), 즉시 반환
                CIMScenarioDispatcher.ExecuteScenarioAsync(scenario.Value);
                return new CommandResult { Success = true, Message = $"Scenario {scenario.Value} started." };
                // 2026-02-28 CursorAI에 의한 주석 처리: 기존 동기 호출
                // CIMScenarioDispatcher.ExecuteScenario(scenario.Value);
                // return new CommandResult { Success = true, Message = $"Scenario {scenario.Value} executed." };                
            }
            return new CommandResult { Success = false, Message = "Execute command requires Scenario parameter." };
        }

        private CommandResult ExecuteCheckEvent(ICommand command)
        {
            string nextstep = "_write_plc_data";
            string restartstep = "";
            string errorstep = "";

            return new CommandResult { Success = true, Message = "Check event (TOPENG_Device event bits)." };
        }
        private CommandResult ExecuteExecuteEvent(ICommand command)
        {
            string nextstep = "_write_plc_data";
            string restartstep = "";
            string errorstep = "";

            return new CommandResult { Success = true, Message = "Check event (TOPENG_Device event bits)." };
        }       
        private CommandResult ExecuteRun(ICommand command)
        {
            //TODO:
            //step 1.            
            CIMScenario? scenario = GetScenarioFromParameters(command);

            if (scenario.HasValue && _executeScenario == false)
            {                
                bool cond = IsScenarioCondition(scenario.Value);

                if (cond == true)
                {
                    _executeScenario = true;
                    CIMScenarioDispatcher.ExecuteScenario(scenario.Value);
                    _executeScenario = false;
                }
            }
            else
            {

            }


            //step 2. act

            //step 3. write plc


            return new CommandResult { Success = true, Message = "PLC write via MPLC buffers." };
        }

        private static CIMScenario? GetScenarioFromParameters(ICommand command)
        {
            if (command.Parameters != null && command.Parameters.TryGetValue("Scenario", out object val) && val != null)
            {
                if (Enum.TryParse(val.ToString(), out CIMScenario sc))
                    return sc;
            }
            if (command.Parameters != null && command.Parameters.TryGetValue("ScenarioId", out object idVal) && idVal != null && int.TryParse(idVal.ToString(), out int id) && id >= 0 && id <= 46)
                return (CIMScenario)id;

            // 260304, TEST 수정
            foreach (CIMScenario index in Enum.GetValues(typeof(CIMScenario)))
            {
                if (IsRequestScenarioCondition(index) == true) 
                    return index;
            }
            return null;
        }

        private static bool IsScenarioCondition(CIMScenario scenario)
        {
            switch (scenario)
            {
                case CIMScenario.Initialize: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_Initialize();
                case CIMScenario.TerminalDisplay: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_TerminalDisplay();
                case CIMScenario.OPCallOccurAndRelease: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_OPCallOccurAndRelease();
                case CIMScenario.InterlockOccur: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_InterlockOccur();
                case CIMScenario.InterlockRelease: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_InterlockRelease();
                case CIMScenario.AlarmOccur: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_AlarmOccur();
                case CIMScenario.AlarmRelease: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_AlarmRelease();
                case CIMScenario.AlarmInquiry: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_AlarmInquiry();
                case CIMScenario.EquipStateChange: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_EquipStateChange();
                case CIMScenario.MaterialChange: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_MaterialChange();
                case CIMScenario.CellInOut: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_CellInOut();
                case CIMScenario.PPIDChange: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_PPIDChange();
                case CIMScenario.PPIDCreateDelete: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_PPIDCreateDelete();
                case CIMScenario.PPIDDownload: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_PPIDDownload();
                case CIMScenario.ParameterChange: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_ParameterChange();
                case CIMScenario.ParameterInquiry: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_ParameterInquiry();
                case CIMScenario.PPIDListInquiry: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_PPIDListInquiry();
                case CIMScenario.EquipConstantInquiry: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_EquipConstantInquiry();
                case CIMScenario.EquipConstantNameListInquiry: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_EquipConstantNameListInquiry();
                case CIMScenario.EquipPosition: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_EquipPosition();
                case CIMScenario.TPMLoss: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_TPMLoss();
                case CIMScenario.IQCPOLCellInOut: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_IQCPOLCellInOut();
                case CIMScenario.MaterialKittingCancel: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_MaterialKittingCancel();
                case CIMScenario.MaterialAssembleProcess: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_MaterialAssembleProcess();
                case CIMScenario.MaterialNGProcess: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_MaterialNGProcess();
                case CIMScenario.OperatorLogInOut: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_OperatorLogInOut();
                case CIMScenario.MaterialSupplementRequest: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_MaterialSupplementRequest();
                case CIMScenario.MaterialSupplementComplete: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_MaterialSupplementComplete();
                case CIMScenario.MaterialAlarm: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_MaterialAlarm();
                case CIMScenario.APNIDRequestProcess: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_APNIDRequestProcess();
                case CIMScenario.APNIDIssueConfirmProcess: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_APNIDIssueConfirmProcess();
                case CIMScenario.APNIDGrapeIDRequestProcess: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_APNIDGrapeIDRequestProcess();
                case CIMScenario.LoadRequest: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_LoadRequest();
                case CIMScenario.LoadComplete: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_LoadComplete();
                case CIMScenario.UnloadRequest: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_UnloadRequest();
                case CIMScenario.UnloadComplete: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_UnloadComplete();
                case CIMScenario.MaterialLocationUpdate: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_MaterialLocationUpdate();
                case CIMScenario.CellTrackINValidationCheck: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_CellTrackINValidationCheck();
                case CIMScenario.CurrentProcessControlDataRequest: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_CurrentProcessControlDataRequest();
                case CIMScenario.ProcessControlRequestReport: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_ProcessControlRequestReport();
                case CIMScenario.ProcessControlResultReport: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_ProcessControlResultReport();
                case CIMScenario.UnitStatusChange: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_UnitStatusChange();
                case CIMScenario.CellLoaderPortLoadUnload: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_CellLoaderPortLoadUnload();
                case CIMScenario.CellUnloaderPortLoadUnload: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_CellUnloaderPortLoadUnload();
                case CIMScenario.JobStartCancel: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_JobStartCancel();
                case CIMScenario.ProcessJobEvent: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_ProcessJobEvent();
                case CIMScenario.PortStateChange: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_PortStateChange();
                default: return false;
            }
        }
        // 260304, TEST 수정
        private static bool IsRequestScenarioCondition(CIMScenario scenario)
        {
            switch (scenario)
            {
                //case CIMScenario.Initialize: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_Initialize();
                case CIMScenario.TerminalDisplay: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_TerminalDisplay();
                case CIMScenario.OPCallOccurAndRelease: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_OPCallOccurAndRelease();
                case CIMScenario.InterlockOccur: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_InterlockOccur();
                //case CIMScenario.InterlockRelease: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_InterlockRelease();
                //case CIMScenario.AlarmOccur: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_AlarmOccur();
                //case CIMScenario.AlarmRelease: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_AlarmRelease();
                //case CIMScenario.AlarmInquiry: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_AlarmInquiry();
                //case CIMScenario.EquipStateChange: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_EquipStateChange();
                //case CIMScenario.MaterialChange: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_MaterialChange();
                //case CIMScenario.CellInOut: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_CellInOut();
                //case CIMScenario.PPIDChange: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_PPIDChange();
                //case CIMScenario.PPIDCreateDelete: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_PPIDCreateDelete();
                case CIMScenario.PPIDDownload: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_PPIDDownload();
                //case CIMScenario.ParameterChange: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_ParameterChange();
                case CIMScenario.ParameterInquiry: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_ParameterInquiry();
                case CIMScenario.PPIDListInquiry: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_PPIDListInquiry();
                //case CIMScenario.EquipConstantInquiry: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_EquipConstantInquiry();
                case CIMScenario.EquipConstantNameListInquiry: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_EquipConstantNameListInquiry();
                //case CIMScenario.EquipPosition: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_EquipPosition();
                //case CIMScenario.TPMLoss: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_TPMLoss();
                //case CIMScenario.IQCPOLCellInOut: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_IQCPOLCellInOut();
                //case CIMScenario.MaterialKittingCancel: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_MaterialKittingCancel();
                //case CIMScenario.MaterialAssembleProcess: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_MaterialAssembleProcess();
                //case CIMScenario.MaterialNGProcess: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_MaterialNGProcess();
                //case CIMScenario.OperatorLogInOut: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_OperatorLogInOut();
                //case CIMScenario.MaterialSupplementRequest: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_MaterialSupplementRequest();
                //case CIMScenario.MaterialSupplementComplete: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_MaterialSupplementComplete();
                //case CIMScenario.MaterialAlarm: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_MaterialAlarm();
                //case CIMScenario.APNIDRequestProcess: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_APNIDRequestProcess();
                //case CIMScenario.APNIDIssueConfirmProcess: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_APNIDIssueConfirmProcess();
                //case CIMScenario.APNIDGrapeIDRequestProcess: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_APNIDGrapeIDRequestProcess();
                //case CIMScenario.LoadRequest: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_LoadRequest();
                //case CIMScenario.LoadComplete: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_LoadComplete();
                //case CIMScenario.UnloadRequest: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_UnloadRequest();
                //case CIMScenario.UnloadComplete: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_UnloadComplete();
                //case CIMScenario.MaterialLocationUpdate: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_MaterialLocationUpdate();
                //case CIMScenario.CellTrackINValidationCheck: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_CellTrackINValidationCheck();
                //case CIMScenario.CurrentProcessControlDataRequest: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_CurrentProcessControlDataRequest();
                //case CIMScenario.ProcessControlRequestReport: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_ProcessControlRequestReport();
                //case CIMScenario.ProcessControlResultReport: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_ProcessControlResultReport();
                //case CIMScenario.UnitStatusChange: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_UnitStatusChange();
                //case CIMScenario.CellLoaderPortLoadUnload: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_CellLoaderPortLoadUnload();
                //case CIMScenario.CellUnloaderPortLoadUnload: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_CellUnloaderPortLoadUnload();
                //case CIMScenario.JobStartCancel: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_JobStartCancel();
                //case CIMScenario.ProcessJobEvent: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_ProcessJobEvent();
                //case CIMScenario.PortStateChange: return CIMScenarioDispatcher.IsScenario_PortStateChange();
                default: return false;
            }
        }
    }
}
